summary: CapyMatch UI Redesign - Left Sidebar Layout Testing Complete. All features verified: Left sidebar navigation, topbar layout, dark hero sections with personalized greetings, KPI metrics, role-specific views (Director vs Coach), and navigation between pages. All tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: All layout components (Sidebar, TopBar, AppLayout) properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Role-based sidebar navigation correctly hides 'Roster' from coaches
Dark hero sections with green name styling implemented as specified
4 KPI metrics displayed correctly for both Director and Coach views
User menu dropdown with Profile and Sign out options working
Coach accessing /roster directly gets 403 and redirects to mission-control (proper security)
Onboarding checklist renders above hero for coaches as specified
context_for_next_testing_agent: Left sidebar UI redesign fully verified. Key components: Sidebar.js (left nav with role-based items), TopBar.js (page title, notifications, theme toggle, user menu), AppLayout.js (wrapper that combines Sidebar + TopBar). Director view: DirectorView.js with dark hero showing 4 KPIs (Athletes, Coaches, Events Ahead, Unassigned), Program Brief card, Needs Attention section. Coach view: CoachView.js with onboarding checklist above hero, dark hero with 4 KPIs (My Athletes, Need Action, Events This Week, Alerts), Today's Actions card, My Roster card. All authenticated pages wrapped in AppLayout via ProtectedRoute in App.js. Login page correctly has NO sidebar. Data-testids: sidebar, sidebar-nav, nav-dashboard/events/advocacy/program/roster/ai-features, topbar, notifications-button, theme-toggle, user-profile-area, user-menu-trigger, user-display-name, user-menu-dropdown, menu-profile-link, menu-logout-link, director-hero, coach-hero, director-mission-control, coach-mission-control, onboarding-checklist, todays-actions-card, my-roster-card.
